case_title: PETER GLENISTER VS. RADIO CAB CO. et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLENISTER, PETER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-09-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-09-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RADIO CAB CO.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO JAMES WESLEY HITE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-09-2008 AT 1:30PM.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RADIO CAB CO.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,649.86 FILED BY GLENISTER, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT RADIO CAB CO. HITE, JAMES WESLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-02-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HITE, JAMES WESLEY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLENISTER, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RADIO CAB CO. $6,649.86 PRINCIPAL, $102.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,752.36, DEFENDANT HITE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE - DEFECTIVE SERVICE OF PROCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAY-30-2008 AS TO DEFENDANT RADIO CAB CO.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GLENISTER, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT RADIO CAB CO.
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF GLENISTER, PETER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2008 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT RADIO CAB CO. HEARING SET FOR JUN-30-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-02-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RADIO CAB CO.
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT.
